Carelabs helps Australian businesses accomplish their operational goals by perfecting their protective relays.
At Carelabs, we use ETAP software to conduct arc flash studies in Australia. Our solutions cover safety, reliability, compliance, efficiency, and sustainability for your system.
Our team of experts helps determine electric relay coordination through our technical expertise and advanced software like ETAP. Our solutions comply with Australian standards like AS/NZS 4836.
The results from the relay coordination study help implement the necessary changes for system upgrades and ongoing maintenance.
Graphical Time-Current Curve (TCC) Interface - ETAP has an extensive database of protective relays with their time-current curves (TCCs).
Automated Coordination Tools - automates processes like adjusting relay pickups, time dials, and instantaneous trip elements to achieve better selectivity.
Scenario-Based Analysis - manage multiple study scenarios without recreating your one-line diagram each time.
Reporting & Documentation - Generate relay setting reports and TCC plots that clearly detail which adjustments were made and why.
